scripts.build:agent: cd ../../agent && source .venv/bin/activate && export UV_HTTP_TIMEOUT=120 && uv pip install -e . && export PYINSTALLER_CONFIG_DIR=/tmp/pyinstaller_config && pyinstaller runtime_agent.spec && rm -rf ../apps/desktop/src-tauri/resources/runtime_agent.tar.gz && mkdir -p ../apps/desktop/src-tauri/resources && tar -czf ../apps/desktop/src-tauri/resources/runtime_agent.tar.gz -C dist runtime_agent
scripts.tauri:build:macos: npm run build:agent && tauri build --bundles app,dmg --target aarch64-apple-darwin
scripts.tauri:build:macos:intel: npm run build:agent && tauri build --bundles app,dmg --target x86_64-apple-darwin
scripts.tauri:build:macos:universal: npm run build:agent && tauri build --bundles app,dmg --target universal-apple-darwin
